CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Lift Stay, Confirm Arbitration Award, And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALEC BERGER'S Petition To Lift Stay, Confirm Arbitration Award, And Enter Judgment.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on the same day. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEFENDANT AND PETITIONER ALEC BERGER'S PETITION TO LIFT STAY, CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, AND ENTER JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Shane, 415.464.2020 of Shane Law appearing for Plaintiff James Rigney.
Adrian Driscoll, 415.788.1900 of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney appearing for Defendant Alec Berger.

The matter was not called. Parties submitt to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT AND PETITIONER ALEC BERGER'S PETITION TO LIFT STAY, CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, AND ENTER JUDGMENT is GRANTED. The stay is ordered lifted, and judgment is entered in favor of Petitioner and against Respondents, in accordance with the arbitration award. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
